data.title: Adcytherix secures EUR 105M in Series A funding to boost antibody-drug conjugate pipeline with novel payloads.
data.description: Adcytherix has recently secured a substantial EUR 105 million in Series A funding. The purpose of this funding is to propel the advancement of their innovative Antibody-Drug Conjugate Pipeline, which focuses on incorporating unique payloads. This investment is expected to significantly accelerate the development and commercialization of their novel therapies.

data.title: Circle Pharma is presenting on anti-tumor potential of cyclin D1 RxL inhibition at AACR-NCI-EORTC Conference on Oct 22-26, 2025.
data.description: Circle Pharma, Inc., based in South San Francisco, revealed groundbreaking findings at the AACR-NCI-EORTC International Conference on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics in Boston, MA. They are paving the way in targeted macrocycle therapeutics for cancer treatment. Their upcoming poster presentation at the conference from October 22 - 26, 2025, will showcase the promising preclinical anti-tumor effects of cyclin D1 RxL inhibition. This marks a significant step in the development of cutting-edge cancer therapies.

data.title: Gold prices are soaring, reaching $4,250, up 60% YTD, potentially due to Trump administration's buying. Bank of America raised 2026 forecast to $5,000. Treasury Secretary dismisses anti-dollar sentiment.
data.description: Gold prices have surged by over 60% year-to-date, reaching $4,250 on Thursday, making it the best-performing year since 1979. Some experts suggest that the Trump administration may be discreetly purchasing gold due to the unusual price action, with portfolio manager Otavio Costa speculating that the U.S. government is behind the buying frenzy. Gold has experienced nine consecutive weeks of gains, the longest streak since August 2020. Bank of America has raised its 2026 price forecast for gold to $5,000 per ounce, while Yardeni also increased its gold forecast. despite Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent denying any anti-dollar sentiment or de-dollarization theories, acknowledging the imbalance between gold buyers and sellers. This central-bank-led gold rush signals a potentially historic trend in the gold market.

data.title: Trump's tariffs causing price hikes post Beige Book; overall economy relatively stable; analyst sees low recession risks.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book report highlights that tariffs imposed by the Trump administration are causing higher costs for businesses, which are being passed on to consumers. Despite this, the economy is relatively stable, with minimal changes overall. Tariff-related price increases were seen in several districts, affecting manufacturing and retail sectors. Some businesses absorbed the initial costs to maintain market share, while others passed them on to customers. This has resulted in price-sensitive behavior, especially among lower- and middle-income households. The economic situation varies across different districts, with three reporting slight growth, five experiencing no change, and four indicating uncertain conditions. Overall, the risks of a recession remain low according to analysts.

data.title: US govt shutdown may last 5-6 weeks, warns Moody's Economist Zandi. No end in sight, temporary pay solution delays crisis.
data.description: Despite a last-minute action by the Pentagon to secure pay for U.S. troops, the federal government shutdown remains ongoing, with no clear end in sight. Moody's Analytics Chief Economist Mark Zandi has warned that the deadlock could extend to an unprecedented "five, six weeks." Zandi emphasized the urgent need for a resolution, stating that the current temporary pay fix only delays an inevitable crisis. Without progress on a comprehensive funding agreement, Zandi predicts that the shutdown will endure until critical services falter. He stressed that if the shutdown surpasses a month, a resolution must be reached as "something is going to break." Amidst the halt in important federal data releases, economists are turning to private data sources to assess the labor market's status. The discussions highlight the uncertainty surrounding the shutdown's duration and its impact. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Golden Triangle Ventures initiates $10 million restructuring plan, aims to retire 1.4 billion shares, reduce authorized shares, and launch a buyback program .
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on October 16, 2025, Golden Triangle Ventures, Inc. (OTC: GTVH) disclosed the initiation of a strategic restructuring initiative. This plan aims to eradicate the outstanding convertible debt, retire 1.4 billion shares, lower the authorized shares, and implement a structured buyback scheme linking company performance with shareholder value.

data.title: Rise in Black unemployment as federal layoffs and diversity measures end, impacting historically strong market for Black workers.
data.description: Layoffs at the federal level, along with the discontinuation of diversity programs, have had a detrimental effect on the labor market for Black workers. This has led to a decline in job opportunities and economic stability for this group, despite previously positive trends. The impact of these changes is notable, with a reduction in employment rates and a decrease in overall job security for Black individuals. This shift highlights the vulnerability of this demographic in the current economic climate.

data.title: Oatly predicts global beverage trends in 2026: more Asian flavors, decaf growth (90x in 2025), and rise of fiber for gut health.
data.description: Oatly Group AB released its first-ever The Future of Taste Report, identifying five key trends in the drink industry based on interviews and quantitative data, including:1. Global Flavor Exchange: More flavors and ingredients from Asia emerging on menus worldwide.2. LA Conscious Indulgence: Increased demand for decaf and low-sugar options for mindful, health-conscious consumers.3. Berlin Nostalgia: Consumers seek drinks that evoke positive memories for mental well-being.4. Seoul Fiber Trend: Fibermaxxing trend surging, with 9500% increase in media mentions in 2025.5. Gut Health Focus: Prebiotics becoming more popular, following a similar growth pattern as protein. These trends are shaping the future of drink choices globally.
New corporate overview now live on Auddia's website, offering key insights and figures. #Auddia #corporateoverview
Bitcoin Bancorp finalizes FINRA approval to change name to Bitcoin Bancorp and new trading symbol "BCBC".

data.title: Wikipedia sees decrease in traffic as AI responses serve content. Wikimedia reports search engines and chatbots deliver info directly to users.
data.description: The Wikimedia Foundation has identified a concerning pattern where search engines and chatbots are offering Wikipedia's content directly to users, bypassing the site itself. This practice has shown a significant impact, with a noticeable increase in users accessing information through these platforms instead.

data.title: Founder of VC firm calls stablecoins 'central business digital currencies', advises caution and thorough review before investing. -Jeremy Kranz
data.description: The founder of Sentinel Global, Jeremy Kranz, emphasized that investors need to exercise caution and thoroughly review the details of any stablecoin before making investment decisions. Kranz's advice underscores the importance of due diligence in light of the growing popularity of stablecoins in the market. It is crucial for investors to understand the intricate aspects of these digital assets to safeguard their investments effectively. By heeding Kranz's counsel, investors can navigate the volatile landscape of cryptocurrencies more effectively and mitigate potential risks associated with unstable market conditions.

data.title: Global DUV Lithography Systems market to reach USD 23.69 billion by 2031 from USD 15.44 billion in 2024 at a growing CAGR.
data.description: In October 18, 2025, it was reported that the market size of DUV Lithography Systems was valued at $15.44 billion in 2024. It is expected to grow to $23.69 billion by 2031, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of...

data.title: HKUST Congregation 2025 awards 5 honorary doctorates to distinguished leaders in Hong Kong, Pro-Chancellor Dr. John CHAN present.
data.description: On October 18, 2025, Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) conducted Congregation 2025 and granted Honorary Doctorates to five esteemed leaders. Dr. John CHAN Cho-Chak, HKUST Pro-Chancellor, presented the awards at the ceremony. The event marked a significant recognition of outstanding contributions, with a total of five individuals being honored on this occasion.

data.title: Sify Technologies (NASDAQ: SIFY) to report Q2 FY 2025-26 financial results on 25th Oct 2025 before market opens.
data.description: Sify Technologies Limited, a prominent Digital ICT solutions provider in India with global service offerings in Data Center, Cloud, Networks, Security, and Digital services, is set to release its unaudited IFRS financial results for the second quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. The announcement will be made on Saturday, October 25, 2025, before the market opens. Sify Technologies Limited is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIFY.

data.title: A lithium battery fire caused an Air China flight to make an emergency landing. No injuries reported.
data.description: A battery caught fire unexpectedly while placed in a piece of luggage stored in the overhead bin of an aircraft. Fortunately, the airline confirmed that there were zero injuries reported as a result of this incident.

data.title: 13th Annual Energy Day Festival in Houston attracted thousands of students with STEM exhibits, academic awards, and energy education.
data.description: The recent Energy Day Festival held in Houston, now in its 13th year, motivated numerous students by showcasing STEM exhibits, presenting academic awards, and providing valuable real-world energy education opportunities. The event attracted thousands of attendees and emphasized the importance of STEM education and innovation in the energy sector.

data.title: Merck, Pfizer, and Astellas offer hope to bladder cancer patients with aggressive form - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Three pharmaceutical giants, Merck, Pfizer, and Astellas Pharma, are providing promising prospects for patients battling a severe type of bladder cancer. This development has sparked enthusiasm in the medical community and is considered a significant step forward in cancer treatment. The collaboration between these companies offers renewed hope for patients, with experts highlighting the immense impact it could have on those affected by the disease. This breakthrough represents a major advancement in the fight against bladder cancer and showcases the potential for innovative treatments to transform patient outcomes.

data.title: Litecoin creator Charlie Lee wishes he didn't create it, instead advises to buy and hold Bitcoin. Creating Litecoin was a "headache."
data.description: The creator of Litecoin, Charlie Lee, discussed the upcoming debut of a Litecoin exchange-traded fund on Wall Street, describing it as a "headache" and expressing regret for pursuing it. During an interview with CoinDesk on Sept. 30, Lee advised his younger self to solely invest in Bitcoin without engaging in any other crypto-related activities. Lee, a former Google employee, admitted that creating Litecoin did not bring him significant profits and was a challenging experience. He expressed admiration for the anonymity of Bitcoin's creator, Satoshi Nakamoto. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cupshe launches For the Plot Party Collection with The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives stars Jennifer Affleck, Demi Engemann, and Layla Taylor.
data.description: Los Angeles, on October 18, 2025 - Cupshe, a prominent fashion brand, has introduced its latest collaboration named For the Plot Party Collection. This exclusive collection is a result of their partnership with the famous stars from The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives - Jennifer Affleck, Demi Engemann, and Layla Taylor. The capsule showcases three unique edits and is expected to make a significant impact in the fashion industry.
